description:
Switch from copied files to symlinks for Claude Code config.

## What was done
- Updated dotfiles repo with latest config (CLAUDE.md, settings.json, statusline-command.sh, mcp.json)
- Modified install.sh to use symlinks instead of copying
- Added migration docs to README-DOTFILES.md

## Migration Steps

```bash
# 1. Remove the copied files in ~/.claude (state dirs stay intact)
rm ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md
rm ~/.claude/settings.json
rm ~/.claude/statusline-command.sh
rm ~/.claude/mcp.json
rm -rf ~/.claude/agents
rm -rf ~/.claude/skills

# 2. Run the install script to create symlinks
cd ~/projects/dotfiles-macos
./install.sh  # Select option 5 (Claude Code configurations only)

# 3. Verify symlinks work
ls -la ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md
# Should show: CLAUDE.md -> /Users/duy.nguyen/projects/dotfiles-macos/claude/CLAUDE.md
```

## Commit the Changes

```bash
cd ~/projects/dotfiles-macos
git add claude/ install.sh
git commit -m 'Update Claude config with symlink support and latest settings'
git push
```
title: Migrate ~/.claude to symlinks from dotfiles repo
